play_store_reviews.text: I loved this app when it worked. It locked me out of my tasks. I could see the list but not details of tasks. I thought it was because I had changed my email address, so I reinstalled it and signed back up. It locked me out again. I had gotten an email a couple of weeks ago about the free trial expiring, but this was long enough after that I don't think they're related. Either way, done. Deleted. I need an app I can rely on, and this isn't it.

2 stars because the desktop version does still work fine, but since about 3 weeks ago the android version is CONSTANTLY crashing. I can only use it about 10% of the time. About twice a day I have to put the app to deep sleep just so I can use it a few times in a day. Doesn't matter if on cell or wifi, it is a daily issue. Please figure out the issue and fix it.

The app works great except for one seriously annoying fault. I keep having to re-upload pictures over and over again to get them to actually fully upload. No matter if I'm on wifi, 5G, full bars, give each update 5-10 minutes, it doesn't matter. 50-90% of my photos and updates will not upload for my boss to see on her end, but show as being there on my end.

It is a great platform, but only for teams. If you are on your own, just don't waste your time. I had a student account, which has basic features. But there are two main things that are in Pro plan: automatins and dependencies. And the pro plan is only sold starting from 3 seats. Which means if you are on your own you "have to" pay for two more people. And that's just too expensive and not worth it. Clickup has all these features for free. It is harder honestly to learn clickup, but it worth it.

I think the initial presentation of the UI is nice, but the functionality falls short IMHO. I expected more of an intuitive process flow but instead this service had more of a clunky feeling to it. The CRM feature was the biggest disappointment. So, I contact Customer Care. Initially, the customer care agent was polite. She asked me why I wanted to cancel and then when it came time to issue the refund (after less than a week), they seriously would not just refund the entire amount I paid. I never "used" this product. I just browsed around the interface and checked out a few training videos. They get a 1-star because they would not refund the entire year back to me. It was a petty thing to do on their part and they completely ruined any chance of me, or my team, using or purchasing their product in the future for doing that. I am highly disappointed in their customer service team for their pettiness.

App is buggy and doesn't save changes made 100% of the time. Desktop site is much better and more intuitive - 'not yet optimized for mobile' might best describe its current state. That aside, join their student program and get a free account to use as a student! Well worth it, though it clearly is more designed for collaboration than individual use.

I've always liked the Monday interface and it works well on desktop but on mobile there's some major issues and flaws. Often status labels will be incorrect or mislabeled and columns and items are often missing and not up-to-date despite best efforts on mobile. But equally unfortunate is that once you have the mobile app and you need to ask some other items you can't even go to your browser anymore because there's no way not to open the app unless you uninstall it.

One of the worst app experiences I've ever had. I honestly can't see how this has such a high rating other than potentially paying for reviews. The app CONSTANTLY messes up when creating simple items and gets mixed up, out of sync, sometimes just doesn't create the item but doesn't tell you, etc. Editing updates just doesn't seem to work when putting a checklist in, not sure if that's a consistent bug or otherwise. The thing is a buggy mess that's barely usable for basic adding of items.

others rave about how user friendly it is, but it sure isn't only one tutorial that covers barely anything and don't even think about messing up with the Ai automations! cuz you cant delete them normally and its impossible to find out how to actually delete them also the two way sync with Google calendar is glitchy half the time maybe this app is good when you know how to use it, but if not its just a confusing mess

one of my pain point as a field technician is how i need to see how my projects are going and easily be able to add/update tasks to review later. Well this app has been briliant for it, not only can i do the above but i can create forms to get data from a site survey that are super simple to make and then fill in while on the job right from the app making it hassle free and i know where the data will be stored.

I use the app for my personal task management, Which means I am the owner/creator of all the boards on my dashboard. But recently, I haven't been able to add an item, delete tasks or boards, edit however I like because it states that as a member, I don't have the permission to do all of these things. it's quite frustrating because i am not a member, but the owner. I don't know if it's a glitch but it's really frustrating that I haven't been able to do anything with the app.
Does not support multiple accounts even though they do support it on the iOS version. Automations on tasks run really slow. If you need these things you're probably better off just using the website.

I can't proceed with Sign up. It's stucked after selecting the number of people within the business or organization. Specifically, the screen "I want to manage _____". There's no list of options and no CTA button as well.

It's an All-in-One app that has streamlined so much areas of my job, and so easy to navigate and utilize. It has literally made at least 5 separate platforms obsolete. Highly recommend for the Workplace, Institutions and Business Management.
I love it it has helped me organize and track multiple projects at a glance. it cool if you like that sort of thing.
One of the worst apps i've used. I can't even arrange my dates properly without the said date dropping all the way down to the bottom of the page. It's really frustrating n it slows down my work more

Frustrating. I've decided I want to delete my account but I can't find a way to through the app and I don't have a computer right now. The sign-in process is super annoying, it didn't remember my different teams I accidentally created when starting with the app, so I would have to go back to my e-mail to find my team names to sign in. I've reached support twice asking them to delete my account and they haven't confirmed my account(s) were deleted. Also, they send A LOT of emails.

I'm one of the only android users on my team and am having a lot of frustrations with the flow of the app. Every time I click on or view anything in my inbox, then click the back button it takes me back to my boards page instead of staying in the inbox. Extremely frustrating and a huge time waster. I don't have a "done" button that the iPhones seem to have. I've sent in a bug so we'll see if it gets addressed. Edit: after 2 weeks of corresponding with their team, they fixed the bug.

Not for mobile app. The pc version is great but the mobile app is horrid. Editing it is near impossible. The functionality of it is near zero. I shouldn't have to google how to do basic functions like change the picture, there should just be an icon on the picture to edit. Timeline is an actual joke. It's so small, you get two letters of your task and can't get any discernible information from it. Mobile is my main usage, so will not be continuing with it.

App only has half the features and no access to support. No dashboards, no feeds, no automation, nada. And that would be ok, but if you try access the desktop version via your browser, it forces you to the app, where its badly limited. So for my team and I, it's useless. We're now limited to how and where we can work. Really, really disappointed, especially as we pay for this.
I love to check off a list. Very helpful to keep check of what I have to do.

This is such a great app! I had a bit of trouble logging in (no one else in my group did, fault of my device) and contacted support. I explained the problem and the issue was resolved very quickly. Thank you to Molly Darmon and Bradley Vanderhorst for making the process fast and easy. The format is bright and you can set tasks with notifications to your email or phone number. So easy to organise things fort STEM project!

I use Monday on the web to see what tasks I have assigned to me by the supervisors and the project management team and verify the dates and details of the assigned tasks. Zero tasks appear on the mobile app. It's completely useless to me.
cant access important parts of the platform on mobile and requires desktop to log in an perform admin tasks.
buggy, laggy and just doesn't work, killed a once great app
Easy to understand and enjoyed the colors amd color coding

Just made a subtask and was immediately locked out of it because I'm not the "owner". As the only person using it I should be the admin and owner of everything. No obvious way to rectify the problem. This is absolutely infuriating. I'm deleting it immediately and will now refuse any suggestions for my teams to use it.

this is probably the ultimate application one would need for organising life, dumping all things at the back of our mind that need to be done and assigning dates to them and getting them done with an organised approach based on priority and urgency, and even including others as well. Thanks a lot for this wonderful app that improves quality of life.

DO NOT USE if you are using Monday docs inside boards (it does not appear to affect dedicated docs) The last update complete broke docs. When you open a doc, it will start moving your content around, deleting and duplicating stuff

this is probably the ultimate application one would need for organising life, dumping all things at the back of our mind that need to be done and assigning dates to them and getting them done with an organised approach based on priority and urgency, and even including others as well. Thanks a lot for this wonderful app that improves quality of life.
I applied this technology to our office to help track the stages of hundreds of projects. Once it is set up it is easy to use. it can be easily modified with automations.
As free using with 3 free function of Main table, Calendar and Kanban is helping my life easier for my work. Thank you I hope you can still give useful functions for free as this is helping me a lot.

It's more of a display app for stuff youve already set up on the desktop. If you search the guide for help, they show you how to do things on the desktop and not this app. For example, I cannot delete or edit columns. I wish I'd known before I wasted time trying to set up a board. I may use the desktop and then come back to the app but probably not.

the App is very good. One thing that is not so good is that when reviewing a board you can do it in landscape mode but if you want to view comments or go back to view another board, it switches to portrait Mode again. This is very annoying when you're in a meeting and want to work through pulses and boards quickly. If this is sorted then it's a 5 star app.

Good app but if you want to use the desktop version and you're not a student have to pay a pretty massive fee. They don't really seem to have a great price if you're using it for personal uses. I wish I could set telephone alarms with it ( not just notifications) and a countdown widget on the desktop would be really great for keeping track of nearing deadlines. Ie 8 days and 4 hours until midterm X or meeting y

Love the desk top view, and would love if the app didn't fail so much. It doesn't update like it's supposed and won't refresh. My company uses this daily and it's a great tool, but when I'm in a meeting and away from my team and I'm checking up on the task on the board it's not updated. I've had to install, uninstall, and re-install numerous times just to get it to work. I've even contacted a rep and have yet to hear back from anyone.

Connects super slow using mobile data, but its fast once it does connect. However, once you close the app you have to wait to connect again. It's a pain. It's great for wifi use but terrible for mobile data. I have used this app on 5 different types of phones the problem is with the app not catching up with the new devices. Its good for a phone that is last years model but not this years.
working with documents is not possible; share link generates strange long url; overall UI is laggy

The app is terrible. Constantly crashes and boards only partially load and then lag like crazy until it crashes. I'm tracking 4000 customers and adding more daily. The biggest downfall besides stability is the lack of filters on the app. Filters are critical to my workflow but aren't supported so it forces me to carry a laptop around so I can access my data.

Stops working at 8am, it wont connect to the servers right when we need it most. Doesn't keep track of when people log in if its unable to connect so we're constantly having to update peoples punch in times. Unable to organize lists from a phone, seems to only have the option from a PC.

Horrible if I could get away with a 0 star, but I have to put 1 star. This App is just plain horrible to use on any phone, freezes, crashes, sometimes it's acting like it's working but it's doing absolutely nothing, and then crashes again. I have installed this on 2 different phones and recieved the same results. Don't waste your time on it, till they take the time to fix the WHOLE APP.

App is slow and crashes alot. Maybe 10 more updates and the app will be good. Feels like buget exel. This is one of the worst apps i have ever used. If i wasn't forced to use this app for work, i would delete this garbage in seconds. I really hope this app is free, cause if not it's a total scam. Using this app adds another 1hr to my job cause it crashes over and over trying to select items. Great work guys, i wish i could get paid to do nothing. Must be a startup company. Obviously failing.

alot of work to do on chromebook devices. EDIT: Seems the Devs, really want me to tell them why a low rating and how they can improve. If you want to install this app on a Chromebook, run it, you can see the 40% of the screen is used. The app works but no better than my phone and yes i can use the www, but APP is what i WANT to use. going back to web i guess for now.

Great app! Very customizable and beats the pants off of Microsoft To-Do or Google Tasks if you know how to categorize and prioritize your tasks. Cross platform for Mac, PC, iOS and Android and love how it automatically syncs between all of them. Also great for project management and team coordination when you get into the big leagues. I much prefer it over Asana and other solutions because the basic version is free and premium is more fully featured and affordable than others.

Click Bait and False Information. Said completely free. When I logged in didn't have anything I read it said it did. Kept just trying to make me log into new pages and the new pages didn't have what I was looking for. Went to delete my data and close account and they can't because all of a sudden I have a "free trial" for a completely free account. So they can't close my account until the free trial is over. Then the next chat says 30 days. Click baiting liars. Reported to FTC.

Uninstalled within 5 minutes. User interface needs work. Difficult to navigate website. Anything attempted on app immediately directs user to desktop site. Desktop site is bare and does not demonstrate professional forethought. Most links dont work and do nothing when selected. Boring to say the least. Service is a paid subscription.

This is handsdown the best productivity tool I've worked with. As a freelancer (and a forgetful person), I have to organize myself to be always on top of projects so I've tried many many tools out there. I've never seen one that achieves being easy to use, feature rich and not being tied to a particular workflow style this well. I bought it and if you care about your time, you should too.

not bad my buddy set this up as to keep us on track for our future business. with the ability to watch each others progress on certain things. but I would like the ability to edit my profile and change name from the email I signed up with to my actual name or edit anything really about myself. as far as I'm aware I cannot.

Man, I'm not sure what the update was. I was hoping to get a completely revamped interface. For example....Still opens immediately to inbox. Is would like the option to have it default to one of my selected boards. So, instead, I need to navigate through to where I need to be. Also, probably the biggest thing on my wishlist was for drag-n-drop. I should be able to drag-n-drop pulses from list to list or to a different group for a quick organization of my day while I'm on the move.

You have a good concept app and a huge potential, but I can't use it because it is filled with bugs, both Android and Desktop. I can't create new groups, my profile photo is rotated, it just gets frozen on some pages, etc. Work a little bit more on this app, then release it for real

Used the free trial to set everything up how I wanted it. After I paid I lost everything. After being bombarded by e-mails from multiple people at the same time. I eventually was able to send the requested screenshot only to never receive an answer or help. Talked to a different person each time, which made things more confusing. Basically, I had to rebuild everything I had already done. Lost work orders and dates. I'm not sure why I sent the screenshot when I got no response.

Awesome app for my company (plumbing, heating and air conditioning) to use to keep track of all of our new construction jobs. We're able to put in and schedule all the job phases, what employees will be working on them, cost of materials and hours clocked at each stage of the job, record "extras" and change orders as needed, per new build. I'm able to schedule and keep track and update wherever I'm at, whether in the office on my desktop computer or out of the office from my mobile/tablet.

I tend to use the app in conjunction with the desktop website (which works fine) but the latest updates to the app (android) have made it sluggish and the words take forever to write out, pausing the screen between each letter and on occasion crashing altogether when posting an update to a new pulse. Not best pleased when I'm trying to update my work day tasks. Other than that, the app has been great.

I think i need to edit my review. Actually I needed to extend my trial for a week more cos my finance side hasn't banked in the money. When I asked the MOnday sales team for an extension, they didn't reply me at all and the next day I logged in, I got view only. I mean 24/7? Now I am a bit held back. 24/7 support is important to us. I mean if u can at least reply sorry, we cant extend. At least I can screenshot n back up and show my boss something. Anyway thanks for the experience.

Worked fine for 3 days. Then on the 4th day, Monday wants to verify email, but proceeds to fail to verify every single time when following the link from email. Also suddenly refuses to let me access the board and "fails to load board" even when it did so perfectly yesterday. Very odd how your system fails to verify, then locks me out of half the basic options when I can't. That eager to sell my email address off huh

Hope Devs see this as I've been using for 6 months now all with zero issues until a month or so ago when there was an update and now I can't open files from the board, I click them and nothing, I have to login to Firefox in desktop mode to be able to open them, very very annoying please fix, and I'll fix my review Edit contacted the support email given, and they are useless just got canned responses it was like they didn't read the email at all

Consistent file viewing problems for the nearly 2 years. JPEG & PDF more often than not, will NOT load on desktop version. Reported to support many, many times but nothing is ever resolved. File viewing via the Android app is even worse. You can't preview the file and you need to download the file to determine what it is. As soon as I can properly research a replacement package I will be gone. I won't look back. My advice is not to download this app and look elsewhere.

Update: Previous issues have been resolved, thanks! I'm having a few other problems though - when adding new items to the board I can't subscribe other members to this item (I can do this on my computer so I have the permissions), also tags not activating on updates, and I can't find the option to edit updates. Thank you!

Less than impressed with the mobile version. I login through my work account and it keeps trying to create a separate board for some reason. If you are going to have a work login system that works anywhere, I shouldn't have to jump through hoops to get my android mobile version working. If work didn't require this app, I'd have the developer options blocking the this software IP from even displaying in ads.

The app is much less developed than the web version. Simplicity has reigned at the expense of functionality. My favourite competitor is Wrike and I could fill a book with the features the Wrike app offers which this lacks. Not only are subtasks not supported, but tasks themselves don't even have a description. 'info boxes' are where you add details and extra materials on a task, but you can't edit those on the app, so you get to write a (very short) task title and that's it.

I love being able to switch between the desktop app and the mobile app to continue my productivity and communicating with my team wherever I go. I work in marketing, so my work is pretty mobile, being able to switch between the two is really helpful and handy. I used to use Asana, and the monday interface for their mobile app is a lot more user friendly.

I started using this a couple days ago. I wanted to use it to be able to keep track of project specific emails. however, I am having trouble with syncing from the desktop version to the mobile version. im not even sure if the email integration feature even works... kinda a bummer because I like how easy the app seemingly is to use.

This app did not work very well! Although it was quite a nice design and it did not throw subscriptions at you, it does not have features that it claims it has. I deleted a day after installing. Then it began a free trial AFTER I had deleted it. Luckily I cancelled it on the last day. However I gave it 2 stars because you don't know what is behind the money barrier and the free version is ok.

No text formatting options at all writing updates. When adding an update, 7 buttons at the bottom of the window, none lead to anything like bullet points, color, size, underline, etc. This makes the app basically useless for me since I have to read stuff and then remember to later update from a computer.

cant change to landscape mode or see all categories on a single page without swiping. I used to use Monday on chrome on my phone but now it only opens to download the app page and isnt available as desktop version on the phone anymore. I won't download the app because it doesn't meet my needs like it did as desktop version on my browser.

I cannot rely on this app to work consistently. It's buggy, often refuses to show me information that is easily visible on my PC browser, and the only way to fix those is by reinstalling the whole thing. After all that the issues resurface after a few days. Why is the app so much worse than the browser? Filters are also barely usable on the app too. Whenever I'm using this, I feel like I'm on a limited, unreliable and unpredictable version of the amazing desktop website. Very disappointed.

App gets stuck loading all the time now. Just uninstalled. When it was working, basic functions like updating statuses and attaching files wouldn't work. The online desktop version and the app I use on my Macbook work fine, but this mobile one just isn't worth it. Frustrating since I frequently am needing to work from my phone.

Monday app have long time in the internet. Its fast. The interface is more focused in the task groups. A little Issue : Its a little difficult to set long text notes in the tasks. The low rating it is because you need a paid account to access to plus features in combination with privacy concerns and maybe developers profit form about sharing data with unknown 3th parties for (analytics, advertising and marketing) i disagree.

UI great, UE meh, and overpriced imo. Not bad, we use it because we needed something similar very quickly and now we are going with it. I did not regret it but wouldn't recommend either. The basic subscription is not much more than doing the same in Microsoft Excel, but it's online.

Amazing for our game development studio. All the tools you could ever need to implement Agile into your company. User friendly, thoughtful and inspiring design. Cute icons and small touches to keep everyone motivated. Also allows for exporting data and easy task viewing. Everyone knows what needs to be done at all times and is always notified. An incredible service for the price.

App dont work very well, cant add files, search dont work at all, cant move items from 1 group to a different one, all these options work on pc but not the app, board description dont work on app, sometimes I get error column cant update, this app needs alot of work, once it's fixed I might buy this program for now I'll use something else. website is awesome just not the app.

It would be great if it worked. But it doesn't. I can't delete a board once it's been made, there is no tutorial on how to even use it that i could see, I can't delete certain group titles or it gives me errors, and I can't even change the name of the board. Get back to me when you're app actually works.

When I was switching from instagram to monday, feedback "wizard" poped up. I was so tired from traveling and I have mistook it for instagram feedback, so I wrote bunch of irrelevant stuff like pictures and I even mentioned facebook (You can guess how mad I am about changes on instagram :D). My real feedback: I really like your app, even though I don't use it for business plans (yet) but for personal reasons. In that context I find it somewhat confusing to navigate but it is very nice app.

Edit: they brought back the old map style, which works, but is still buggier than a Bethesda game. 3/5 Sluggish app experience. They change things and break them in updates, (they had changed the map type and maps stopped working and you couldn't select items from the map anymore, but that's been fixed again) , filters are broken as all hell. A very buggy app.

looks great, I've spent some time noodling around to see if this will fit our business, one of the main features that I am looking for is the time tracking, but seeing as this feature is not functioning on the mobile app I think I will wait before we start a paid subscription. For the Devs: Getting the column center functions(such as the time tracking feature) to be usable in the mobile app should be at the forefront. My business supplies mobiles, not PCs for us mobile is paramount.

Doesn't save stuff randomly. I've wasted a lot of time typing out things, and when I leave the update page, 10% of the time, it deletes everything without any way to recover it. Also, when you duplicate an item, it needs to be in the group that you want it to stay in rather than duplicating in the original group. It's very tedious and counterintuitive. How can you mess up such an easy thing... I'd be better off writing it down at this point. 0/10

Pros: Very user-friendly. Useful templates along with the ability to customize. Eye-catching and flows well. Syncs right away with the web version on my computer. 30-day free trail with tutorials was especially helpful! Cons: No free "lite" version. The lowest cost plan doesn't include some basic functionality, such as video calling; video calling app integrations only included in higher-tiered plans. A bit on the pricey side compared to other work management systems.

Pretty Solid Free Version, Enough Features & Templates for Personal & Team Management. As we grow out Business, probably plan to purchase Paid Package. Great Customer Service - very responsive on Facebook Messenger. Synching is seamless between multiple devices. Some Bugs in Appearance on Tablet, if not using External Keyboard (Name Tagging, for example). Otherwise, AMAZING APP.

UPDATED (because of reply): Testing the app **for more than a month**, e-mails coming and going with bugs and no straight answers. **I've had to add the phrase between the ** because the "polite answer you gave makes me look like "No emails were sent" and the ball is on my side. First email was sent on 28/10 (yes, October). From that point on, nothing was solved. Any more information you may need, please check your team's inbox. Thanks

From start it requires account. Then... no tutorial, hints or anything useful in understanding the app. Everything is hidden under series of clicks and the "templates" do not explain anything (just gyess what is item/category/group on list). If you never used any system like this (like me) but are looking for something to organize your work, then skip this as the app is useless and NOT intuitive at all!

FAQs go on in detail about how you can log in with Google yet the app doesn't offer that. When the instructions don't match the experience the company is usually poorly run. If only the apple app offers this then i guess that tells us all we need to know about their commitment to this platform! Moved on.

I love the desktop version but the mobile app doesn't do everything I need it to. Specifically adding pictures to the update section (taking pictures on the spot, not uploading from gallery). I have to wonder if there's I'm doing something wrong, but it will rarely let me take a photo into the update section.

I was excited to try the app for our team's project, but it proved completely unusable on Android. Stuck in a login loop. Tried registering twice, the first time my account was registered and then I could not login as it did not exist in the db. The second, I log in and immediately as I try to interact with the UI get logged out again...

I can't seem to provide a screenshot but when I view the app in light mode, while I'm using a board random blocks will look as though they've gone into dark mode except the text stays black/dark grey so I can't see what I'm typing. I have to keep closing and opening boards to get it back to normal. Very annoying. Otherwise the all is alright, does the basics.

The app and the platform are super awesome. I work in IT and we have so many resources we need to keep track of for projects/tasks and this has been the best platform to do it. My favorite features are the customized tabs and colors to keep track of different things, and being able to view many boards in the dashboard keeps things organized without the hassle of putting everything into one board. My coworkers and I are very happy with Monday!

Has a steep learning curve and not as good as the ads show. One of the main problem is if you are not connected to the Internet you can't access your list of things to do. It is not smartphone friendly, best used on a PC, what the heck is a "pulse"! Can't resize that field either. Its too wide and big for smartphones

Severely broken on tablet. Landscape renderings only sometimes exist (half the time it's just the portrait mode on its side) and simple functions (like submitting an update to a task) won't work. I suspect the app is much better on a phone, but stick to the browser version if you're on a tablet. Samsung Galaxy Tab S7+ Android 11

This app is now on the first screen of my phone! The facebook ad just got me and I felt this is exactly what I need for project management. I use other tools like Trello but I feel they're too big and crowded for me. I used this for my single projects and it was a totally different experience! I can track my work in one unified list represented with colors similar to google sheets but more personalized and better ui! I would love to utilize this app more❤❤❤

Desktop version works well but the mobile app is a mess. Things constantly show up in the wrong category. Once an item is moved to a new category, if a square was highlighted, that color remains in the old category, leading to a lot of random colorful empty squares across the table. It makes things really confusing. I don't use it for much besides messaging at this point. More recently, it's been doing a strange thing where it will say a board was updated 1 minute ago every hour of every day.

I find the app to be a valuable tool for managing and tracking my weekly finances. However, I’ve encountered a persistent issue where changes made to the document are not being saved. This has been occurring for over a month now, causing significant inconvenience as the app reverts to previous edits. I attempted to submit feedback through the app but unfortunately, I have yet to receive a response. I hope this issue can be resolved promptly as it significantly impacts the usability.

Doesn't tell you you're starting a trial when you open an account, and the only way to delete your account is by contacting an admin. I really wanted to be able to use this app but it was terribly glitchy within the first few hours of use. Tasks kept duplicating themselves and sections I had deleted kept reappearing.

App forces portrait mode. Like many others, my tablet (Lenovo Yoga) has a keyboard, and the screen is supposed to operate on landscape mode, so the app is unusable here. Sadly, the website doesn't allow me to login on the tablet (it says I need to use the app), so I guess Monday is not a good option for many tablet users.

Well, I started using it and it's a great platform. You see all of your planning and all of your work and when they due and past the due date. I got to work with one other who collaborated well. What didnt like is how my account expired when they advertise and lead to believe it's free to use. I logged in my account only to find that I have to pay as my account has expired. I feel as though this platform scammed me. Now, I can't see what I've done or up to. Now I've moved on to Tuesday 👎

GLITCHY. Simple things such as editing phone numbers, adding subtasks, and editing profile photos results in a glitch to the phone app, a quick flash of a subtask, and zero changes to the picture respectively. It is important that I use this app everywhere, but I am limited to the web app. Clearly did not do much testing before releasing this version.

We use this at work and it started out good, but about a week ago all of a sudden I lost the ability to use Webforms in the app which I was previously able to use. It tell me I have to log in and when I click the button to log in (which I already was) it then takes me to a page telling me to download the Monday app which I was already using. Then that takes me to the Play store and it's just an endless cycle. Have tried email support with no response.

it's intuitive and easy to start using. I haven't played with evey feature yet, but it seems to be pretty effective. it gives a great visual layout that could be described as the really attractive and popular cousin to excel or sheets. I found some of the functionality to not be my cup of tea, but that's just one person's opinion.

Best thing I've ever done was download this app, I use it to run my carpentry business and as a tool to stay organised at home. EDIT: I would give this app zero stars if I could, entire app has crashed and I have lost data for all my clients, my next 2 months of scheduling and all my quoting an invoicing records. Currently looking for an alternative app
Really great for getting my team all on the same page!

Everything's fine on my laptop but the android app for some reason doesn't recognize my account. The magic link says the e-mail address is incorrect and when I try entering the password it doesn't work either. Both, however, work on a laptop. I'm willing to change my review if this is fixed because it generally is a good software to use but obviously it's useless as an app on my phone, hence the 1 star.

This really a unique app. Unlike many other programs that you have to adjust to the app way of doing things, this program is totally customized to suit your needs. With more than enough tutorials and personal assistance you can create a perfect system for your work in less than a week or use a template that is customizable in less than a day. This program is worth it and will increase productivity.

Terrible app. The desktop site works fine. But even if you try to use the desktop site option on mobile, it does not allow you to access the desktop site. Multiple critical features missing from the app. The document I was looking for was continually swapped with the wrong file until I uninstalled and reinstalled.

Sorry but this whole monday thing was integrated at my workplace for a while until all of the employees had a meeting and told our boss to change it. It says it's super customizable but I didnt feel that way and I really really didnt like the app. Maybe it's just not a good fit for our line of work, but I couldnt really think of anything I'd ever use it for.

We used this app for a project, then suddenly it kicked us all out, saying we had to pay a subscription. So we lost all our work we put into planning our group project, because we didn't want to pay. If we had known BEFOREHAND that this wasn't a free service, we would have simply used something else. Next time, tell your customer that they'll have to pay, otherwise they put a ton of time into organizing their project, only to lose it all if they don't pay. This is a bad business tactic..

I've been using this crm for last few days. it is needless to say that this crm software has one of the simple and easy to understand interface. it is fantastic. however the Android mobile interface is not upto the mark. there is no filter option available in Android version. I use the LEADer crm, which has excellent Android version best for one person business in phone. That is why I'm looking for a crm which is scalable. My suggestion: make the Android version more effective.

This app is incredibly frustrating to use. It isn't apparent how to delete anything, there are no settings, there is no way to rearrange or organize anything. I don't understand how you even edit the Group Title. its infuriating and a waste of time to have to watch a d**n tutorial on how to perform the most basic of freaking tasks.

I've been using this under trial to figure out if it's what I was to use long term. The "my work" calendar is glitchy and doesn't always update well. The automations updating on the task are very annoying and it's easy to lose human updates. other than those couple of things I find that I really like the Monday program.

Beware. you need to pay for 10 different services for it to start working as advertised. Gmail integration is crippled and useless, you need to pay extra for CRM. There's no decent software development flow support unless you pay for DEV. Need a basic form? you need to pay for WorkForms. Automations take minutes to take effect. There's no decent description field. Item view sucks. You cannot link items from the docs, etc, etc.

EDIT: STILL NO PROGRESS ON BASIC FUNCTIONALITY!! so frustrating! There are several errors in the way functionality translates from desktop. The saved views (sort) do not appear as saved on desktop. If stuff gets removed from a board, it continues to appear for a second or two after deleted for weeks (forever?) Until you log out & back in again. I could go on, but I see from the canned responses below, and my incredibly frustrating experiences with support that nobody really cares to improve it.

I need urgent support. It's been over a month since I reported bugs on your app via email. You vê been extending my trial and trying to fix it before I pay for it. Now trial is expired, all the information is in your database and my company on full stop. I need an urgent answer please!

The inability to customise the date format is very frustrating and leads to confusion as the ROTW uses dd/mm/yyyy but the app is locked into American style. Please add this feature, it's available on the desktop. REVISED AGAIN dropped another stat. Just updated, still forcing me to use MM/DD/YYYY, 12hr time, and week beginning on Sunday, PLEASE fix to allow global date/time. I'll endure the forced American spelling but the calendar causes confusion!

Very limited. Have to use desktop to edit a lot of things, can only view docs not edit, and can't see content from third party integrations. Very disappointing as I often come up with ideas to add while walking and away from pc.

I WOULD NOT recommend for daily PERSONAL tasks but maybe an actual business or project setting as long as the schedule creator doesn't mind the time keeping up with it. Seems to be a little time consuming for a "to-do list", but it can do way more than that. I'll continue to use it for now.

It's a great app. I love how it can be customized to my needs and there a lot of different templates for different tasks. I also appreciate how I can duplicate boards that I'm working on and just modify them to my liking instead of having to redo the whole thing over again. Overall I find it extremely helpful and very versatile.

No such thing as customer service with this program. You have an immediate problem, you have to email. You describe the issue in great detail. Then a day later (several hours if you're lucky) there's a very brief reply confirming the issue, such as "you're asking how to use this function, correct?" After clarifying again, wait another several hours or day, get a completely different person, and it all starts over. Abhorrent excuse for customer service.

Great app, Love it but it has a few glitches, hence the 4 Stars. We're on the fence to upgrade & the risk of that not resolving glitches. GLITCHES: *COST SUMMARY of SUBITEMS - on pc shows actual SUM but on phone app shows all cell values instead. *SUBITEMS auto duplicate when opening or editing and existing subitem. *SORT on SUBITEMS doest work. *INFO BOXES arent editable or completely visible from phone app

I love this tool. I have tried almost every PM tool, and each tool was missing something for my needs. After watching your sponsored ads on YouTube by James Charles and others, I decided to give it a try. I found my perfect solution. I love its simplicity, how colorful and fun it is, and as a sole prop contractor, I love the time tracker, plus its scabale as my biz grows.I even created a post on LinkedIn and others are commenting that they might try it or they want to learn more about it.

It fails to load the boards. I downloaded the App since day one. I had some hopes that it will get better but I see it's worsening while the desktop platform flourishes (although, it's more slow now but you get the work done with better means).

Very awesome. Probably the most customizable project management saas available. However there needs to be something between the free version and the next level up. I need more storage but can't justify the $360 per year. C'mon man, work with us Monday.

surprisingly motivating & easy to organize; visual progress without the daily hassle of checking in on every single app, I have one and it links to everything & I update it when I want & I don't get overwhelmed. it's the best app for free for singular users who are BAD at time management. this helps high key. I can like, PRIORITIZE now! 100/10 HELPFUL.

This is the absolute worst app if you have a android the load speeds are terrible and I can't use any function properly without it bugging out or completely freezing the app and my phone has 5glte and even over wifi it's the same in addition my phone is 8gb ram has no problem running multiple apps and websites simultaneously and even when I close everything else the app still won't work terrible experience

Love this app!! Great for when I'm on the go. I do wish, however, there was an option to add my notes to each individual tab and copy & paste when inputting information like on the desktop version. Hoping these are features in the future.

Does not save input data, hard to navigate, difficult to setup. Only on the Free version so far and using the app on my phone. Very buggy, can't do what I need too, and everything i put in does not save. So far a huge time waster.
Best task and project manager ever! so easy.

Surely something I would like to use again but it has a lot of glitches: If I change the status of a task it doesn't automatically update until when I don't re-open the app but if I open the task itself it is updated. But I can't see it. It is taking me a few attempts before I can see a new row or a new task as it doesn't add them automatically to a project but again: if I close and open the app again, here they are. Also it really miss a calendar integrated. I would not go to premium for now.

I was looking all over the place to find an app that did what this one does. It's a relief to have finally found it. Unfortunately, I am an independent contractor and work alone. I am managing multiple projects at once and Monday does everything I need, but you won't allow me to purchase a single user "seat". I'm required to buy at least three which triples the price I thought I was going to have to pay. I'm now trying to find another tool to replace this one.

Used to be one of my favorite workflow apps, until this message from customer service. Privacy policy is basically... delete before you cancel or we will keep your data and account in our systems forever. "I was checking the email and I was able to find an account but is canceled, the account where your email address is added is not active, I can't get full access to the account, but I can tell you that nobody is using or accessing it. I'm sorry I can't offer you to delete your information."

Needs major work. Can't even do basic functions within the app as in checking an email that has came through the CRM. Doesn't sync fully with the desktop version. Paying the amount of money for this product for our teams to get a halfway working app. Please fix this app.

This app is fine for those on a paid account, but the free student account is worthless. You have to invite other people and have them sign up for the tool to even be able to add any tasks. They are clearly not interested in providing real value to students. I would recommend you seek out other options.

great for a quick all in one data/project management/etc tool! everything is in one place, easy, clean - simple (even for the innumerable computer illiterate corporate executives) everyone on your team will be able to seamlessly pick this up. great for individuals, great for teams in corporate sphere who, all too often; have to rely on excel tables when doing any data management outside of the company's main software. this is far superior.

What's the problem with it? Downloaded this, created my account, but it says the password is wrong. I requested the magic link but I just receive on my e-mail: "incorrect email address". What? Then I did it all again, created another account with another's email, but I receive the same message. I've never was able to even log in.

Quite terrible really. 1) On the My Work tab it shows an item that I have as "without a date" even though it has a date. Other items with a date, on the same project board, are functioning fine. Talked to support, no help they just wasted my time. 2) Can't view all items and subitems in one place, have to literally click into each item to look at the subitems. 3) Other views like Gantt and Timeline are unavailable on the Android app and it's been that way for >1 year since I downloaded the app.

I tried to bear with it but it's too much. I try to open a card, a tab, anything after opening the app, and it either lags or just freezes completely. Just less than an hour ago, I got on the app to check on work I did this morning. It took more than 20 app restarts to even see my grade, and I've restarted the app another 10+ times since then and I **still** haven't been able to read the feedback I was given. I really hope this gets fixed soon.

Didn't work on Pixel 2XL - kept saying trying to contact server even though I tried on 4G/WiFi. Couldn't receive any update from my teammates. Probably unfortunate it didn't work but as Trello works fine, we'll keep using it ! Update - seems to work better now, but too little too late I'm afraid.

I rarely give bad reviews but I'm shocked the rating is 4.9 stars because the interface is so unpleasant to use I played with it for 5 minutes and uninstalled. I was looking for a gantt chart and the project and timeline view are very unpleasant to use... you "slide" everywhere and there is no way to zoom out, rather you're stuck looking at a tiny part. I thought a horizontal view would help see everything at once but instead the header takes up half the screen and everything is still "slidey".

It used to be great. Now plagued with bugs (disappearing messages and images, freezing) and very inefficient support team (when reporting a company wide bug, with screen shots and videos, don't ask me to try in incognito - it's not only my machine- it's all machines). After years of working with Monday, we're slowly migrating new clients and projects to competitors as the system has become too unstable for us. To clarify, not just the app, we're getting the same bugs on web as well and the support team has managed to add so much friction to the process that my team just gave up on them. On our latest contact with them, I've sent them step by step images of the bug and how to replicate it, in return they've asked me to send them images (which I've just send) - what's the point of me crafting a comprehensive step by step explanation of the bug if the team isn't going to read it?

great tool, just wish it had a little more like list functions and better file options etc. I'd like to use this across several of my clients businesses and I miss some of the features that Smartsheet offers like workbooks and personalised web forms, but so far really liking Monday!!

Overpriced money grabbers. Chargine insane amounts for basic features other management apps can do for less or free. Support is also uninformed about their own software and have had several cases where the support gave me false information about their own software or didnt even know themselves how something worked on their own software. Stay away! There are better management software out there for allot cheaper.

Awful. Could not even get through the signup process without it glitching and redirecting me. It would ask for my signup information which I would enter and eventually direct me to the login page. Input my login information that I had just created and it says I dont exist in the system. So do it all again, and it continually redirect me to eventually login but then says I dont exist. Waste of time.

Great app, low cost, really functional and it works. Easy to use. Highly recommend. Love the automations as well, saves tons of time. Can automate emails to keep the customer updated with stages, and can do automated texts for cheap if wanted too.

My company uses this app daily, and is a very powerful tool when it is working. Most of the time however, the app continues to get stuck on the loading screen so often to the point where I'm forced to uninstall the app and primarily use the web browser version.
This application is very good.and beautiful ❤️ thanks for sharing us

difficult time uploading pictures and files on whatever version I have (pixel phone). iPhone version has a progress bar to track upload progress but feature not found in this one. app freezes/crashes when trying to post multiple files at once and often fails to post the upload entirely.

crashes pretty consistently when trying to see subitems. interface in mobile is not friendly with navigating. wish i cpuld view tje desktop version but that is blocked by monday forcing this app to be used. makes it unable to use from my phone. remove the app and let us use the website or fix it.

I can see everything in the app that i put together on desktop, but I cant use any of the sorting options in my tables. i can see the options, but when I click, nothing happens. i also cannot edit status labels. I am looking for a different service.

I contacted with the support team many times about support Arabic interface they told me they are working in it but not available yet, my team from different cultures so some of them can't speak English so I'm enforced to translate some of tasks or tags, buttons etc . Also Monday Wep app pretty stable than the phone app,( it's too slow, stupid search engine, missing notifications, freezing sometimes with android 12) I like it in general but please fix those before transferring to another app

The UI is very minimal, maybe would benefit from some flare. my issue is with linked pulses where I don't see the name of the linked pulse. other bugs identified as well but that one is the most annoying. other than that, very happy with it.

Customer service is phenomenal. Follow-up emails and notifications are relevant and timely. The app itself is very good! I love being able to see my task list and assign deadlines dates and add attachments to the pulses. Would highly recommend!

This is the ultimate product in mass production management and tracking. Using Monday has replaced my requirement to sync with two and three of my peers hourly to stay abreast of deadlines and deliverables in a high octane work environment. Highly recommended!

Edit: 01/01/21 Had many issues where users could not set up the app on their phone. Monday fixed the issue. I've updated the review to 5 stars thanks guys. I use it alot. I also have Asana, its similar but has some other features, I'll probably keep Monday though and unsubscribe from Asana. I hope that they add an alexa skill so I can add and check off items without having to reach for my phone. They have an unofficial one but its super glitchy. Please add Alexa soon! Thanks guys.

The Monday app is awesome for personal and professional project management. I would like to see an always free version with fewer bells and whistles for small projects. I would also like to see some of the desktop features available on mobile.

This app is terrible! Do you want to see tasks assigned to you with no date, in one place? can't do it you have to scroll through many boards Do you want to see tasks that are overdue from prior weeks in one place? can't do it, you have to scroll week by week. Do you want to set recurring tasks by date, can't. Does the "legendary" support center know if this will be fixed. Nope Do they want my money for a sub par app? Yup. One Star until you clean up these items.

The computer app works very well, but whenever I use it on my phone none of my tasks/assignments show up in the inbox/my week section. Also I wish there was easy access to a calendar which, if there is, I am unable to find.

Does exactly what you need and more. It's optimized which means unlike other apps, Monday loads quickly no matter how many boards or tasks. The interface is incredibly intuitive and simplistic. I've implemented Monday for my team (of 10-20 people) and they went from never using task management to creating workspaces and automations. Top task management service for an office environment!

App is very User Friendly. App provides unlimited amount of usages that makes you and/your teams productive, also great for managing your personal endeavors. Monday app provides and Easy approach to time management accountability and for tasks and goals controls and achievement. App is very good also for day-to-day processes of small and large projects. If you are an operator, this app can become your defacto tool to use daily. Check the app!

App looks beautiful & has a lot of functionality, although I really need the 'Link to Pulse' column to start working in the app. Hopefully in the next update or two, it will. So far, I really love that the team at Monday seems to be constantly updating, innovating, & improving. That makes me very motivated to stick with them; just to see what they'll come up with next!

"Success is acheived by completing relevant tasks" - Brian Tracey. I have always lived by that code but never found any app that truly helped me. Not even a basic notepad or a simple calender. Monday helps me break my dreams into goals then break those goals into small tasks. I can then schedule those small tasks over hours and days and even up to weeks and years. I have never been more productive and progressive in my life until i found Monday. A big thanks to them and a job well done!

It's kinda organized and easy to use. But got lots of bugs. How to remove team members who don't work at the company anymore? I can't find any remove button. And also i can't edit my account name. It's pretty frustrating tbh

I cannot speak for using it for teams but for just myself it's great until they slap on a 25 dollar price to do what I used to do in sticky notes. If there was a free tier for solo use it would be 4.5 maybe 5 star but it doesn't and for my uses that killed it

Been having some trouble using this app on my android phone.. Takes way too long for boards to load.. can't adjust filters.. says "this version of app doesn't support filter change".. somewhere along those lines.. there are some people I can't add on the conversation bubble..

The timer, and activity tracking is kinda suck in a way because my company use it to stalk us in every move we make. Talk about micromanaging as its finest. Somehow it didn't show the new task in the board even I'm keep refreshing it on my phone. It didn't function well on the phone.

Useful for keeping track of updates and communication, other than that I prefer to use the desktop app. Could you please group new notifications? (Same as with whatsapp, email, etc.) Mutiple notifications are currently not being grouped and make my phones notifications section very busy :)

I have never felt so in control of my business. This platform has given me a means to track the high level status and details of projects, leads, and tasks. I've been a user for a week and my internal systems and workflow are SO much cleaner and efficient. Bravo! PLEASE make Updates editable, especially checklists!

I haven't had a chance to use it yet because it seems to come with a learning curve but if I could learn to use it... life as I know right now would be so much easier. Your tutorials are great but you need to slow done. I have it on my phone and really difficult to follow where you are pointing so I don't have any reference as to what you are talking about. Thank you for putting the free version out there!

We use Monday for literally everything at work, managing projects, inventory, fleet even key set movements, best of all, I don't even need my laptop to work, works great on the go on my mobile. Highly recommend Monday to anybody that needs to mange.....well...just about anything👌🏻

Best project management app I've ever used (and I've used a lot). It's not as useless as Slack, as time-consuming as Trello, or as limited as Basecamp. My favorite part are the visualizations— I've always been frustrated that other productivity apps can't visualize the data I give them, but Monday can. They make it easy & useful. And finally, the app has a ton of automation I haven't really scratched the surface of, but that looks v promising— like Infusionsoft level promising!

For some reason, I am no longer getting notifications from this app anymore....when someone sends me a message or a task is assigned to me, I have to login to the desktop version to see it, this is not cool. Please fix it ASAP!

Totally worth it for teams. Makes MS teams seem like it was designed in 1999. Amazing organizer, it really makes staying organized on and task super easy. Makes managing a collaborative team a breeze, a million times better than email, excel spreadsheets, or for that matter MS Teams. This couldnt be more true than when your team is spread out across different offices. App is a great addition to the service. Looking forward to see how they improve a already great service.

This app was so needed to keep our team organized, accountable, and informed on the multitude of projects that are always occurring at the same time. It's an incredible tool to keep everything in one place. I especially love the ability to attach relevant files and documents to their respective projects!

By far l, thus app is one of the most important pieces of every work day for me. It's functionality, design, user friendly interface, and connectivity, not to mention how integrative it is, makes it an invaluable tool to any professional trying to unite members of a team working to complete any projects they have currently active. Upload files, stay in touch with team members, monitor the status of work items, and see your workflow and timeliness in real time. Absolutely amazing. Best app ever.

I was looking to better organise my projects and I have to say, the mountain of adverts was actually right. This Monday app has the potential to be really useful for business owners as well as large faceless corporate entities. I'm still feeling my way round, but I've got a suspicion it's going to help with project organisation immensely.
All the tools a busy person needs.

Love it, a bit confusing at first, so many configuration possible. The team at Monday are really helpful and actively looking to help. Still need to get more in depth knowledge. Need to adapt as the tool is not yet doing everything Id like.

Outlook integration is what I need and I just knew that this app would allow me to add to my task straight from an email. I mean Teamwork is a little less fancy but it has this feature and it's the reason I have to stop using Monday.

Monday is by far the best project management tool I've ever found and I started using it to manage the 100 people strong student team I was managing in designing a Hyperloop. And it works very well for managing large teams and you can have many admins that take care of their own sub-teams and is highly customisable for whatever you need. Right now I use it just on my own to manage a personal design project to keep track of tasks and to make sure I don't forget doing anything and track progress.

When you download the app there is no guide at first to tell you about the features so had to explore on my own. I added boards to see how they look and no matter how many times I click on delete still wouldn't delete the created boards. I somehow created a task to test and there is no delete button anywhere. seems to be a good starting app but has a long way to go.

Love this app. I have a suggestion though - on desktop you have a dashboard and you can add a to-do list. This is the one thing I'm missing - if I could access my to do list and add items as I run around... That would be the best ever.
It can sometimes be a bit clunky and I wish there was a way to filter/sort views without it changing it for every user. Has been useful for my team overall and I would recommend it in general

It's perfect, but there is one thing.. Why can't I do something in the application like create or edit the tasks while not connected to the internet .. I should work in the offline mode of the net and then when I open the net the sync takes place.

Great when it works. Every update so far causes me to lose the ability to click and drag, unless I uninstall reinstall, very frustrating and a huge waste of time. If you're just using it on a desktop though, it's great!

Haven't had fully experienced BUT...this is sad I keep getting emails stating I am invited to see or view something from this app. How is this possible and I have no connection to these emails or people that email me. It sounds like spam to me because I've never heard of this before except in Google drive. I believe its the same. I just don't understand why my email to the app...?? Its frustrating

Great, but no for small businesses. Best Organization app so far fell in love, unfortunately for a small interior design business the cost out weighed keeping it. It would be great, if a free basic package was introduced then an upgrade from there.

Absolutely love this app. It goes so much more granular than most other apps, I use loads of different boards. Couldn't live without it. Obviously the app has less functionality than the desktop sote but I can do 90% of my work on the app

After installing your newest update, my account suddenly got closed. Without my knowledge. My mistake? I trusted the app so much I did not have a back up of my work there. And when I try to reactivate it, it continuously redirects me to open my account BUT again it got closed.

The app is a shortened version of the website which is a great combination. The website is by far the best organizational tool my team has ever used and the app is a great way to get a glance view without overloading the app with the complete set of functions. We have been able to effectively track our weaknesses in real time in terms of where we are wasting time and resources. It has improved our process and improved our collaboration.

This app might be good for some, but without having a daily task list available in app like on the web, it's essentially useless for my team. Hopefully this gets implemented in the future, but until then we will likely use a different tracking solution.

Honestly, I love this! It really helps me keep track of my homework and art responsibilities, and the customization options are really neat!! My only regret is that, as a high school student, I don't have the money to pay for it :") I'd love it if there were a payment option for only one person!!

Much better and more visual than the likes if horrid Jira but it still takes a while to onboard and can get messy with all the updates and checklists. There should be a way to relate sub tasks and dependencies without turning it into atlassian :-) Very good start though by improving the usual UX problem we have with all project delivery tools.
When app updates are out of sync, the app doesn't seem to allow you to write comments/updates, the send button does nothing. Comments also frequently fail to load. It's generally just broken.

It is a good app. It is easy to use and post tasks etc, but it does not tell you that you are on a free trial. I thought it was free, but ended up realising that I was on a free trial without being told properly in the app.

Super easy user interface. The dashboard is fully customizable, you can make it your own. Unless I missed it somewhere, it would be nice if it alerted you for tasks that are coming up or have passed their deadline, but all in all, still very helpful

Desktop app is messy to begin with and the UI on android is even worse. Constant issues with repeated log in requests, failing and then logging in by itself and next time the same comedy again. Useless for me. I will leave it to the paid shills to leave 5-star reviews.

Customizable, user friendly, so simple and the automations are quite unique and constantly improving. Only matter I can point out for platform to improve is the sub item summery. it's battery form chart is the only option I noticed and it does not properly reflect the metrics I want to see

Monday, the software, is AMAZING. Obviously the software is designed for workstations. The app isn't even close in it's usefulness. Cluttered, buggy and inability to control notifications, are among of the issues.

Monday breaks down the wall!!! Communication everyone can see. I am a Supervisor this app has helped our team to execute at a higher level. From tasking to visible lay out of what needs to be run. From problem solving to what we need to make it work on the floor. Thanks to the Monday team for all your help....

MY GODNESS, this is what I've dream of! I like to organize but without apps, somehow it's easier to get messy. Though i have to adjust in this app, but I already see the future of my mastermind of work. I even can see it clearly how, who, and what can I do with it. THANK YOU SO MUCH!!!

Definitely expensive!! You should try Asana, it's free and same stuff. Edit: answering the devs... you should make it paid for some features or for large teams, not for everyone. I'm trying to run my 3 men startup and I could use, like and share to other friends. But we live in a poor country with no money to survive, our minimum wage is $1/h, how am I supposed to pay for it? Companies should think in each country's life before making prices to applications.

we've been using this app for a while. I like how you can change and arrange to accommodate information in a way that is accessible for everyone and to achieve as well as organise all our information. It's great that they are improving and integrating other apps as well.

I absolutely love this app but a couple of annoying bugs that happen from time to time. Sometimes when I click the "Filter" button it will crash the app. When I create new status colors, it changes the previous colors to the new one I selected. But for that bug it fixes itself whenever I close the app and relaunch it. Lastly whenever you make a new item in a group, it will scroll all the way down the screen once it's been made. Either than that I really love this app!

I love this app. You can handle all your projects in one place. Very easy to use and personalize. The best part is that you can assign an specific task to a member and he/or she will get a notification by email, and even, they will receive a notification to remember one task or project is coming due. Great job!

Please add support for widgets!! So I would be able to select a board a see all the groups and pulses in the selected board. It would help serve as a reminder, every time I unlock my phone, it's the first thing I want to see and add pulses easily.
